metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2103
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.2,3; The authors use both a dom neg FLRT3 protein and a shRNA knockdown and observe a reduction in the number of exc. synapses. The membrane adhesion part of FLRT3 with LPHN3 is shown directly by co-cultured LPHN3-GFP expressing neurons and FLRT3 expressing HEK cells that induces clustering of LPHN3.. Experimental description: from Supplemental Experimental Procedures;
"Hippocampal neurons were cultured from P0 Long-Evans rats (Charles
River) and plated on poly-D-lysine (Millipore), and laminin (Invitrogen) coated
chamber slides (Nalge Nunc International)."

Overexpressed protein: "Full-length cDNAs encoding mouse Flrt1, Flrt2, Flrt3, and Lphn3 (accession numbers BC070403, BC096471, BC052043, and BC088989, respectively) and a partial Lphn1 cDNA (BC085138) were purchased from Thermo Scientific/Open Biosystems"

11/12/2017 Pim
- Because the most important data is obtained with the overexpressed mouse protein, I use mouse as selected species.

checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
